pm-memory.description: Product-history corpus (PRDs, tickets, customer calls). list_documents / get_document / search_corpus.

team-registry.description: Cross-team activity feed (sprints + decisions). list_teams / get_team_activity / search_across_teams.

slack.description: Slack workspace. Real API via SLACK_BOT_TOKEN; synthetic responses when unset. DRY_RUN=true turns writes into stderr logs.

jira.description: Jira Cloud. Real API via JIRA_HOST + JIRA_EMAIL + JIRA_API_TOKEN; synthetic responses when any is unset. DRY_RUN=true turns writes into stderr logs.

github.description: GitHub PR review tools. Real API via GITHUB_TOKEN + GITHUB_REPO; synthetic mode reads JSON fixtures from 05_pr_reviewer/synthetic_prs/. DRY_RUN=true turns review-comment posts into stderr logs.

confluence.description: Confluence Cloud (read-only). Real API via CONFLUENCE_HOST + CONFLUENCE_EMAIL + CONFLUENCE_API_TOKEN; synthetic mode otherwise.

grafana.description: Grafana (read-only metrics + dashboards). Real via GRAFANA_URL + GRAFANA_API_TOKEN; synthetic mode otherwise.
